demos.reasoning: A LegalAgent is a role or position that holds legal power or authority, which implies that its instances are non-rigid (can change over time) and have no inherent unity as an entity, and they typically do not have own identity or unity. Their existence depends on the human entity holding the role or position.

fields.description: Optional usage context for the entity
Brief explanation of the analysis and classification
Identity meta-property value: '+I' (carries identity) or '-I' (no identity)
Own Identity meta-property value: '+O' (supplies own IC) or '-O' (does not supply own IC)
